prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-PROSPECTKEYCHAINS-PARENT Product Type: KEYCHAIN Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 1pc Stainless Steel Gold Prospecting Carabiner Keychain, Lightweight Durable EDC Split Ring Key Holder (2 Styles) Description: Carry your passion for gold prospecting or gold panning wherever you go, with our Gold Panner or Sluice Box Stainless Steel Carabiner Keychains. Designed for outdoor enthusiasts and hobbyists, these keychains feature detailed, prospecting-inspired silhouettes that reflect the tools and lifestyle of real gold seekers. Whether you’re in the field or just want a subtle nod to your favorite outdoor hobby, these designs bring character to your everyday carry.

Made from durable stainless steel, each keychain is built to handle rugged environments without rusting or wearing down, meaning they’ll stand up to use around water, dirt and changing outdoor conditions. The solid construction ensures long-lasting performance, whether clipped to your gear during a day at the river or used daily with your keys.

The integrated carabiner allows for quick and secure attachment to gear, belt loops, keys, backpacks or bags, giving you easy access. The included split ring keeps your keys organized and firmly in place, making it a practical addition to your everyday carry setup or outdoor kit.

Choose from two styles: Gold Panner or Sluice Box Search Terms: gold prospecting keychain gold panning gear miner gift sluice box accessory prospector tool edc clip outdoor key holder camping hiking survival kit gear gold miner accessory mining themed keychain metal carabiner key ring prospecting equipment gift Features: - UNIQUE GOLD PROSPECTING KEYCHAINS: Choose from detailed sluice box or gold panner silhouettes, making these keychains a perfect everyday carry item for gold prospectors to attach to keys or outdoor gear - DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Constructed from corrosion resistant stainless steel for long lasting performance in rugged outdoor environments - INTEGRATED CARABINER CLIP: Quickly attach to backpacks, belt loops, backpacks, bags or keyrings with built in carabiner for convenient access and secure carry - SPLIT RING INCLUDED: Comes with a sturdy metal split ring, making it easy to organize keys, small tools or accessories without additional hardware - LIGHTWEIGHT EVERYDAY CARRY: Compact and easy to carry without adding bulk; unique and original gift for miners and prospectors === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 80 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
